name: Arbitrage Rebate Spending Exception

eligibility.description: Issuers who expend all gross proceeds for the governmental purpose of the issue within 6 months of issuance.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts bond issuers from the requirement to rebate arbitrage profits to the U.S. Treasury if proceeds are spent within 6 months.
